Hero.description: Experience Belgrade with premium comfort, a central base in Savamala, and a calmer city stay shaped around practical details guests actually use.

About.locationDesc: We are located in the center of the city, around a <highlight>10-minute walk from Kalemegdan</highlight>, close to the River Sava, Branko's Bridge, and many more attractions.
About.bullet1: Tourist attractions, markets, and clubs just around the corner
About.bullet2: About a 10-minute walk to Kalemegdan Fortress
About.bullet3: Hidden from street noise despite central location
About.importantNoteDesc: We are located on the 5th floor of a building with no elevator. However, we offer a huge beautiful terrace lounge where you can relax, enjoy coffee/tea, and take in the city view away from the noise.
About.comfortDesc: Bright rooms, shared spaces, and the practical details that make the stay feel easy from day one.
About.fac1Desc: Bright, air-conditioned rooms with a spotless and relaxed feel.
About.fac2Desc: Cable TV, book exchange, and a relaxed common area for guests.
About.fac3Desc: Laundry service and CCTV security focused on everyday comfort.
About.practicalDetails: The practical details that make the stay easy
About.atmosphereDesc: A quick look at the terrace, lounge, and shared spaces that shape the everyday hostel feel.
About.guestInfoDesc: During your stay, we can help with practical local information, transport basics, and everyday pointers that make the city easier to navigate.
About.info1Desc: Helpful orientation and practical local pointers for moving around Belgrade.
About.info2Desc: Useful stay-related recommendations if you need help planning around the city.
About.info3Desc: Quick guidance for buses, local transport timing, and practical route details.
About.info4Desc: Support with ticket-related questions and planning for onward travel.
About.info5Desc: Belgrade maps and practical tips that make exploring the city easier.

Metadata.title: Hostel Downtown Inn - Belgrade
Metadata.description: Modern hostel in the heart of Belgrade with stunning views, comfortable rooms, and unbeatable location. Book your stay today!

Features.description: Everything you need for an unforgettable stay in the heart of Belgrade, presented in a cleaner and more balanced way for the web layout.
Features.highlight1Desc: Thoughtful essentials across every part of the stay.
Features.highlight2Desc: A section that feels social, local, and rooftop-driven.
Features.highlight3Desc: Cleaner cards and sharper hierarchy, aligned with the site.
Features.wifiDesc: Unlimited high-speed internet access throughout the entire hostel.
Features.entDesc: TV with 50+ international and movie channels.
Features.mapsDesc: Belgrade maps with highlighted attractions and recommendations.
Features.terraceDesc: Stunning rooftop terrace with breathtaking city views.
Features.locDesc: Perfectly centrally located in the heart of Belgrade.
Features.comfortDesc: Bright, spacious, spotless rooms with comfortable mattresses.

Rooms.doubleModalSummary: A calmer private room with a double bed, shared facilities, and full access to the terrace, kitchen, and lounge areas.
Rooms.fourModalSummary: A balanced shared room with two bunk beds, personal lockers, and a more intimate hostel atmosphere.
Rooms.sixModalSummary: A brighter, more social dorm with three bunk beds, personal storage, and a lively hostel feel.
Rooms.description: Sunny, bright, and spotless rooms designed to make you feel relaxed, whether you want a private stay or a more social hostel atmosphere.
Rooms.doubleNote: Best for couples or a quieter city stay.
Rooms.doubleDesc: A private room with a double bed and access to the shared bathroom, kitchen, terrace, and lounge.
Rooms.fourNote: Balanced comfort with a more intimate hostel feel.
Rooms.fourDesc: A comfortable shared dorm with two bunk beds, personal lockers, and access to all common hostel spaces.
Rooms.sixNote: More social, more movement, still bright and well kept.
Rooms.sixDesc: A brighter shared room with three bunk beds, personal lockers, and access to the kitchen, terrace, and lounge.
Rooms.importantDesc: A few practical details that help guests know exactly what to expect before arrival.
Rooms.beforeDesc: Short, practical notes about the building, neighborhood, walking distance, and payment details.
